data.name: DescriptionUniquePriority
data.value: Multiple EnvironmentVariableNameFormatAttributes on the same symbol and inherited must have different priority values.

data.name: MessageFormatInvalidFormat
data.value: The formatted string cannot be empty

data.name: DescriptionInvalidFormat
data.value: At least one of the prefix and suffix of Environment Variable Name Format Attribute is not empty.

data.name: DescriptionDuplicateFormat
data.value: Multiple EnvironmentVariableNameFormatAttributes on the same symbol and inherited must have different prefix+suffix combinations.

data.name: MessageFormatDuplicateFormat
data.value: The formatted string '{0}' has already been used

data.name: UseDefaultMessage
data.value: The environment variable '{0}' has been set to the default value '{1}'.
